title: WA crocodile-like ‘sea-salamander’ fossil produces new discovery 50 years after being lost in museum bungle
description: The remains of an ancient marine amphibian that once stalked the WA coastline was first lost to time and then lost to a museum bungle.

title: NASA repurposes Mars Helicopter’s ancient Snapdragon SoC to help Perseverance rover navigate
description: Upgrade allows robot to travel ‘potentially unlimited distances’ without phoning home for help NASA has revealed it repurposed the processor the Perseverance rover used to communicate with the Ingenuity Mars Helicopter, to help the rolling robot navigate the Red Planet autonomously “for potentially unlimited distances.”...

title: Brokers Set Expectations for Fossil Group FY2025 Earnings
description: Fossil Group, Inc. (NASDAQ:FOSL – Free Report) – Analysts at Northland Securities issued their FY2025 earnings per share estimates for Fossil Group in a research note issued on Thursday, February 19th. Northland Securities analyst O. Rickert forecasts that the accessories brand company will post earnings of ($0.81) per share for the year. Northland Securities has [...]
